summary: General Ledger party filter fix verified. Backend API /api/finance/general-ledger/accounts now correctly returns 26 customers, 19 vendors, 53 employees, and 28 projects. Frontend Party dropdown displays all three sections (Customers, Vendors, Employees) with proper styling and filtering works correctly.
passed_tests: API response has correct structure (accounts, categories, control_accounts, party_filters)
Customers list is NOT empty (26 customers returned) - BUG FIXED
Vendors list is NOT empty (19 vendors returned) - BUG FIXED
Employees list is NOT empty (53 employees returned) - BUG FIXED
Projects list is NOT empty (28 projects returned)
Customer data has correct structure (id, name fields)
Vendor data has correct structure (id, name fields)
Employee data has correct structure (id, name fields)
Control accounts are returned (3 control accounts)
Frontend Party dropdown shows Customers section header (blue)
Frontend Party dropdown shows Vendors section header (orange)
Frontend Party dropdown shows Employees section header (purple)
Selecting a customer from dropdown works (Ayisha Shada)
Selecting a vendor from dropdown works (ABC Plywood Traders)
Party filter value is displayed correctly in dropdown after selection
critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly queries customers from projects.client_name and accounting_transactions (party_type='customer')
Fix correctly queries vendors from finance_vendors.name (not vendor_name) and accounting_transactions
Fix correctly queries employees from users collection (with employee roles) and accounting_transactions
Deduplication logic properly merges data from multiple sources
context_for_next_testing_agent: General Ledger party filter fix verified. API returns 26 customers, 19 vendors, 53 employees, 28 projects. Frontend dropdown shows all three party sections with proper color-coded headers. Login uses 'Login with Email' button after expanding 'Local Admin Login' section.

bug_fixed.description: General Ledger /api/finance/general-ledger/accounts was returning empty lists for customers, vendors, and employees
bug_fixed.root_cause: Backend was querying non-existent collections with wrong field names
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed queries to: 1) Get customers from projects.client_name and accounting_transactions, 2) Get vendors from finance_vendors.name (not vendor_name) and accounting_transactions, 3) Get employees from users collection with employee roles and accounting_transactions
bug_fixed.verification: API now returns 26 customers, 19 vendors, 53 employees, 28 projects
